falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (key resistance level from bottom_2024_aug pattern)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this level would indicate trend resumption, invalidating the consolidation/HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score exceeds 60 in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 would confirm a blowoff top scenario, contradicting the current HOLD verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: CPI inflation report shows annualized rate >4.2% in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a reading would trigger aggressive rate hike expectations, causing a bearish shift that invalidates the HOLD signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
